name: lunlunglass
description: LunlunGlass — 眼镜店打印系统（Studio 模板设计 + POS 门店运营）

scripts.dev:studio: concurrently --kill-others -c "cyan.bold,green.bold,yellow.bold" -n frontend,backend,electron "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-backend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-studio-electron dev"
scripts.dev:pos: concurrently --kill-others -c "magenta.bold,blue.bold,yellow.bold" -n frontend,backend,electron "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-backend dev" "pnpm --filter lunlunglass-pos-electron dev"
